'''√h-p-p''' ('''hapapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:magnaflux|magnaflux]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-p-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:magnaflux|magnaflux]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √h-p-p
|-
! Lemma
| hapapa
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || hapapithi || hapapiji || hapapishi || hapapi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || hapaputhuth || hapapujuj || hapapushush || hapap
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || hapaputhu || hapapuju || hapapushu || hapapu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || hapapufuth || hapapufuj || hapapufush || hapapuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || hapapethe || hapapeje || hapapeshe || hapape
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || hapapothoth || hapapojoj || hapaposhosh || hapap
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || hapapotho || hapapojo || hapaposho || hapapo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || hapapofoth || hapapofoj || hapapofosh || hapapof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || hapapïf || hapapïf || hapapïf || hapapïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || hapapïfïf || hapapïfïf || hapapïfïf || hapapïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || hapapïf || hapapïf || hapapïf || hapapïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || hapapïf || hapapïf || hapapïf || hapapïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || hapapæthæ || hapapæjæ || hapapæshæ || hapapæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || hapapathath || hapapajaj || hapapashash || hapap
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || hapapatha || hapapaja || hapapasha || hapapa
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || hapapafath || hapapafaj || hapapafash || hapapaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || hapapasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gohapapasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokihapapasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || hapapnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gohapapnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokihapapnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || hapapshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gohapapnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokihapapshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || hapaproasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gohapapnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokihapaproasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || hapapmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gohapapnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokihapapmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || hapapsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gohapapnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokihapapsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || hapapngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gohapapnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokihapapngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || hapapyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gohapapnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokihapapyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || hapapyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gohapapnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokihapapyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || hapapnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gohapapnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokihapapnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || hapapnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gohapapnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokihapapnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || hapapnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gohapapnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokihapapnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || hapapshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gohapapnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokihapapshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || hapapshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gohapapnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokihapapshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || hapapshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gohapapnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokihapapshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || hapapronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gohapapnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokihapapronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || hapaproshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gohapapnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokihapaproshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || hapapromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gohapapnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokihapapromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || hapapmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gohapapnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokihapapmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || hapapmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gohapapnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokihapapmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || hapapmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gohapapnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokihapapmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || hapap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || hæpæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hohapap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hohæpæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohohapap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohohæpæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nühapap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nühæpæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünühapap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünühæpæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïhapap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïhæpæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïhapap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïhæpæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || luhapap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || luhæpæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luluhapap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luluhæpæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lihapap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lihæpæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilihapap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilihæpæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kohapap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kohæpæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokohapap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokohæpæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kehapap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kehæpæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekehapap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekehæpæp
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
